---
image: img.jpg
title: 'Disenchantment with emotion recognition technologies: Implications and future
  directions'
author: Damien Dupré
description: The Psychological Society of Ireland Annual Conference (PSI 2020)
date: '2020-11-19'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

The Psychological Society of Ireland Annual Conference (PSI 2020)

:::
